---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature / 建议一个新功能
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Feature description / 功能描述
A clear description of the feature you'd like.
描述你想要的功能。

## Why is this needed? / 为什么需要这个功能？
Explain how this feature would help you or improve the experience.
描述这个功能如何帮助你或提升体验。

## Possible solution / 可能的实现方案
(Optional) Describe how you think this could be implemented.
（可选）描述你认为可以如何实现。
